header.name: Return By Death - Behavior Pack
header.description: Re:Zero-inspired Return By Death mechanic for Bedrock Edition (including Pocket Edition). v1.1.0: Configurable save interval, death counter, death log, particle beacon, named save points, configurable sound volume/pitch/broadcast radius, action bar cooldown. Saves player state every 5 seconds. On death, rewinds to save point with the saved inventory and plays the iconic sound.
